code:
import io
import string

let t_opt = io.read_line()
let t = match t_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end
let body = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(body)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    if tok == t
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    count = count
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("count=#{count}")
